name: Meld Control
description: Uses central Meld Studio platform connection settings from the main tool and keeps route/browser settings inside the plugin.
description_de: Verwendet die zentrale Meld-Studio-Verbindung des Hauptprogramms und verwaltet Routen- und Browser-Einstellungen im Plugin.
description_en: Uses the central Meld Studio connection from the main tool and keeps route and browser settings inside the plugin.
